# Reckona AI

> Reckona AI is an AI-first growth and automation partner for India's mid-market. We help ambitious companies grow revenue, dominate AI-era search through Generative Engine Optimization (GEO), and replace repetitive work with AI automation — under one accountable retainer. Based in Mumbai, India. Contact: reckonaai@gmail.com

## About
- [About Reckona AI](https://reckonaai.com/about/): Who we are, what we believe, and how we work — working AI systems plus the growth engine to feed them, at mid-market prices with enterprise discipline.
- [Pricing](https://reckonaai.com/pricing/): Five tiers from Launch to Enterprise, each scoped and quoted after a free audit — no rate card.

## Services
- [All services](https://reckonaai.com/services/): Eight practices under one accountable pod.
- [GEO — Generative Engine Optimization](https://reckonaai.com/services/geo/): Flagship practice. Get cited, recommended and correctly described inside ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Perplexity and Google AI Overviews, measured with a monthly 40-prompt visibility panel.
- [AI Automation](https://reckonaai.com/services/ai-automation/): Knowledge assistants, sales/support/HR/finance agents, WhatsApp automation, document processing and executive dashboards, deployed to your cloud.
- [SEO](https://reckonaai.com/services/seo/): Technical, content, local and enterprise SEO plus digital PR.
- [Web — Design & Engineering](https://reckonaai.com/services/web/): Conversion-focused websites, landing pages, ecommerce and enterprise builds.
- [Social](https://reckonaai.com/services/social/): LinkedIn, Instagram, YouTube and full-stack social content engines.
- [Performance — Paid Acquisition](https://reckonaai.com/services/performance/): Google, Meta and LinkedIn ads, lead-gen systems and CRO.
- [Branding](https://reckonaai.com/services/branding/): Identity systems, brand guides and sales/pitch decks.
- [Consulting & Enablement](https://reckonaai.com/services/consulting/): Transformation roadmaps, fractional AI officer, workshops and training.
